headline: Halliburton (HAL) Stock Still Looks Discounted Despite Its 81% Five Year Run
summary: Halliburton stock has delivered an 81.4% total return over the past five years, and recent news around new contracts in Iraq and mixed demand trends now sits alongside valuation checks that suggest the shares lean cheap rather than stretched. Over five years, Halliburton has returned 81.4%, which puts recent pullbacks into context as part of a longer period of shareholder gains. The new agreement to develop the Bin Omar and Sindibad oil fields in Iraq can support expectations for future...
